title: Paradax Mod Pack
description: a modpack focused on immersion with a tint of QoL
body:
A modpack focused on immersion and Qol sprinkled in, there are a lot of lightweight mods, so dont be too scared of the mod count. 

What it adds:

Combat Mods Armor Mods Weapon Mods Extra Mobs Mods Boss Mods Biome Mods Create

The configs in this pack are based on our demands, feel free to edit them however you like though!

Notable Mods:

Better Combat Create iris Embedium
